_comment_env: Wine/DXVK compatibility vars verbatim from GameHub bg5.smali (EnvVars.a). Only vars GameNative's Container.DEFAULT_ENV_VARS does NOT already set are listed here, to avoid clobbering GameNative's deliberate choices (PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=144, present-mode mailbox, ZINK_DEBUG=compact,deck_emu). Box64/FEX dynarec tuning is owned by the container preset managers (Box86_64PresetManager / FEXCorePresetManager, which emit the correct BOX64_*/FEX_* prefixes) — the old FEXCORE_* keys here were a confirmed no-op (wrong prefix) and were removed; aligning Box64 default VALUES to GameHub needs the verified Box64Config.export() field->env mapping first (TODO), not a guess. NOTE: PROTON_DISABLE_LSTEAMCLIENT was REMOVED — GameHub sets it because its Steam integration uses a different in-Wine agent (SteamAgent.vmp.exe), but GameNative's bionic/real-Steam paths REQUIRE Proton to load lsteamclient.dll so the in-process libsteamclient.so bridge can decrypt CEG. Setting it black-screened every CEG title (Mirror's Edge). The emulator (Goldberg) paths never needed it.

provenance.contributor: GameHub default-prefix provisioning (winetricks-seeded deps + Box64/FEX tuning)
